ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "close_method" TEXT /* Method used to close the account */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report the account is used for */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is active */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_code FOREIGN KEY ("account_code") REFERENCES account_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_close_method FOREIGN KEY ("close_method") REFERENCES close_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type (e.g., asset, liability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent account type */,
  "is_system_type" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account type is a system-defined type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "close_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each closing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the closing method (e.g., unreconciled, balance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the closing method */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the closing method is the default method */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the closing method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the closing method was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial report (e.g., asset, liability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial report */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report type is the default type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the entry is posted to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the entry was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entry */,
  "debit" TEXT /* Debit amount of the entry */,
  "credit" TEXT /* Credit amount of the entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the entry */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the journal entry (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "entry_reference" TEXT /* Reference for the journal entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_entries_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account balance */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "balance_date" TEXT /* Date the balance was calculated */,
  "debit_balance" TEXT /* Total debit balance of the account */,
  "credit_balance" TEXT /* Total credit balance of the account */,
  "balance_type" TEXT /* Type of balance (e.g., opening, closing) */,
  "balance_status" TEXT /* Status of the balance (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_balances_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial report */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the report period */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the account */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., granted, revoked) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent account */,
  "child_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child account */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., consolidation, elimination) */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_relationships_child_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_relationships_parent_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
